title: Collapsible columns / "subcolumns"
excerpt:

posts.author: RobertParsons (Robert Parsons)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to be able to group columns into a group, and be able to quickly expand and collapse those groups.

My use case: we have a very large combined marketing board, with budget columns that cover multiple subsets of budget. For instance, we have a social media budget column, and several columns for different social media channels, that would fit neatly under the heading of “social media budget”.

image718×174 7.56 KB

The table has several such columns and potential sub-columns. It would be neat and easier to navigate if we could put these into groups - e.g. all the social media channel budgets under a parent group of “social media budget” - which could be collapsed and expanded horizontally. This would allow you to narrow and widen the table to the level of detail you required.
